title: Meta is having trouble with rogue AI agents
description: A rogue AI agent inadvertently exposed Meta company and user data to engineers who didn't have permission to see it.

title: Sam Altman’s thank-you to coders draws the memes
description: Altman expresses gratitude for people who knew how to write their code from scratch. The internet replies with salty jokes.

title: Nothing CEO Carl Pei says smartphone apps will disappear as AI agents take their place
description: Nothing CEO Carl Pei says AI agents will eventually replace apps, shifting smartphones toward systems that understand intent and act on a user's behalf.

title: Nvidia is quietly building a multibillion-dollar behemoth to rival its chips business
description: Nvidia's networking business raked in $11 billion last quarter despite getting significantly less fanfare than chips and gaming.

title: Patreon CEO calls AI companies’ fair use argument ‘bogus,’ says creators should be paid
description: Patreon CEO Jack Conte says AI companies should pay creators for training data, arguing their fair use defense falls apart when they license content from major publishers.

title: Rebel Audio is a new AI podcasting tool aimed at first-time creators
description: Rebel Audio is a new all-in-one podcasting tool that allows creators to record podcasts, edit, clip content for social, and publish episodes, all without ever leaving the platform.

title: The Gemini-powered features in Google Workspace that are worth using
description: From summarizing emails, drafting content, organizing data, and tracking meetings, here are all the best Gemini features in Google Workspace.

title: The leaderboard “you can’t game,” funded by the companies it ranks
description: Artificial intelligence models are multiplying fast, and competition is stiff. With so many players crowding the space, which one will be the best — and who decides that? Arena, formerly LM Arena, has emerged as the de facto public leaderboard for frontier LLMs, influencing funding, launches, and PR cycles. In just seven months, the startup went from a UC Berkeley PhD research […]

title: This startup wants to make enterprise software look more like a prompt
description: The company has raised $12 million in seed funding to build an AI operating system for enterprise.

title: Sequen snags $16M to bring TikTok-style personalization tech to any consumer company
description: With its Series A, Sequen is bringing its proprietary AI ranking and personalization technology to large consumer business.

title: Microsoft hires the team of Sequoia-backed AI collaboration platform, Cove
description: AI collaboration startup Cove is shutting down after its team joined Microsoft, with service ending April 1 and customer data set for deletion.

title: The PhD students who became the judges of the AI industry
description: Artificial intelligence models are multiplying fast, and competition is stiff. With so many players crowding the space, which one will be the best — and who decides that? Arena, formerly LM Arena, has emerged as the de facto public leaderboard for frontier LLMs, influencing funding, launches, and PR cycles. In just seven months, the startup went from a UC Berkeley PhD research […]

title: DOD says Anthropic’s ‘red lines’ make it an ‘unacceptable risk to national security’
description: The Defense Department said concerns that Anthropic might "attempt to disable its technology" during "warfighting operations" validate its decision to label the AI firm a supply-chain risk.

title: Mistral bets on ‘build-your-own AI’ as it takes on OpenAI, Anthropic in the enterprise
description: Mistral Forge lets enterprises train custom AI models from scratch on their own data, challenging rivals that rely on fine-tuning and retrieval-based approaches.

title: Why Garry Tan’s Claude Code setup has gotten so much love, and hate
description: Thousands of people are trying Garry Tan's Claude Code setup, which was shared on GitHub. And everyone has an opinion: even Claude, ChatGPT, and Gemini.

title: The Pentagon is developing alternatives to Anthropic, report says
description: After their dramatic falling-out, it doesn't seem as though Anthropic and the Pentagon are getting back together.

title: BuzzFeed debuts AI slop apps in bid for new revenue
description: BuzzFeed unveiled new AI-powered social apps at SXSW, but its demos drew muted reactions.

title: Google’s Personal Intelligence feature is expanding to all US users
description: Personal Intelligence allows Google's AI assistant to tap into your Google ecosystem, such as Gmail and Google Photos, to provide more tailored responses.

title: OpenAI expands government footprint with AWS deal, report says
description: OpenAI has reportedly signed a partnership with AWS to sell its AI systems to the U.S. government for classified and unclassified work, marking an expansion beyond its Pentagon deal last month.

title: AI’s ‘boys’ club’ could widen the wealth gap for women, says Rana el Kaliouby
description: AI investor Rana el Kaliouby warns that if women are shut out of AI funding and leadership, the consequences will be grim.
